title: Platform Modernization — Weekly Status
author: Jordan Lee
summary: Migration to the new observability stack is on track for June 20. API gateway cutover slipped one week due to partner certification delays. Team capacity is stable; hiring for two SRE roles remains in pipeline.

workstreams.name: Observability migration
workstreams.notes: Dashboard parity at 92%. Remaining panels scheduled for next sprint.

workstreams.name: API gateway cutover
workstreams.notes: Partner sandbox certification extended to June 16. Rollback plan validated.

workstreams.name: Cost optimization
workstreams.notes: Reserved instance commitment blocked pending finance approval.

blockers: Finance approval for 12-month reserved instance commitment
Partner API certification window not available until June 16
next_steps: Complete observability dashboard parity by June 13
Schedule gateway cutover dry run for June 17
Escalate reserved instance approval with CFO office

evidence.quote: API gateway cutover slipped one week due to partner certification delays.
Reserved instance commitment blocked pending finance approval.
Schedule gateway cutover dry run for June 17.
